title: Cost Overruns
summary: IT projects, or rather, high-software-content development and projects are plagued by missed (effort) estimates. And thats OK as the potential uptake due to scalability and transformative efficiency gains can be enormous. Now, just how much are typical overruns?

title: What works and what doesn't work
summary: A first field note on practical patterns that help, and patterns that create friction, in organised-anarchy decision settings.

relatedModules.title: 03 · The Garbage Can Model
relatedModules.summary: Interactive narrative, taxonomy, explainer, and simulation of organisational choice under ambiguity.
